# Research

![Research](images/research.png)

Projects using Claude and agentic systems for deep research, report generation, and information synthesis.

### Claude Research Space Public Template
[![View Repo](https://img.shields.io/badge/View%20Repo-blue?style=flat-square&logo=github)](https://github.com/danielrosehill/Claude-Research-Space-Public-Template) ![Template](https://img.shields.io/badge/Template-Ready-green?style=flat-square) ![Agent Workspace](https://img.shields.io/badge/Agent-Workspace-purple?style=flat-square)

### Claude Single Company Research
[![View Repo](https://img.shields.io/badge/View%20Repo-blue?style=flat-square&logo=github)](https://github.com/danielrosehill/Claude-Single-Company-Research) ![Agent Workspace](https://img.shields.io/badge/Agent-Workspace-purple?style=flat-square)

Targeted intelligence-gathering workspace dedicated to depth on a single company — organizes per-lens analysis (financial, product, leadership, risk), open questions, sources, timelines, and synthesized findings.

### Claude Technical Research Template
[![View Repo](https://img.shields.io/badge/View%20Repo-blue?style=flat-square&logo=github)](https://github.com/danielrosehill/Claude-Technical-Research-Template) ![Template](https://img.shields.io/badge/Template-Ready-green?style=flat-square) ![Agent Workspace](https://img.shields.io/badge/Agent-Workspace-purple?style=flat-square)

Workspace for asking an AI agent technical how-to questions and turning the conversations into a living, maintainable reference — each topic captured as paired `questions/` and `ideas/` files with revision, follow-up, and Typst-PDF consolidation commands.

---

### Company Research
[![View Repo](https://img.shields.io/badge/View%20Repo-blue?style=flat-square&logo=github)](https://github.com/danielrosehill/Company-Research) ![Agent Workspace](https://img.shields.io/badge/Agent-Workspace-purple?style=flat-square)

Systematically researches companies through a user-defined lens (job hunter, investor, BD, vendor evaluator, journalist), tailoring research dimensions, weighting, and scoring to the captured purpose before bundling Typst PDF reports.

---

### Experiment Report Template
[![View Repo](https://img.shields.io/badge/View%20Repo-blue?style=flat-square&logo=github)](https://github.com/danielrosehill/Experiment-Report-Template) ![Template](https://img.shields.io/badge/Template-Ready-green?style=flat-square) ![Agent Workspace](https://img.shields.io/badge/Agent-Workspace-purple?style=flat-square)

Structured workspace for designing experiments, running trials, analyzing results, and generating reports — enforces a design → execute → analyze → report lifecycle for tool comparisons, benchmarks, and A/B tests.
